en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Switzerland Statutory Labor Insurance documentation in the Switzerland Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
The insurance policy certificate is issued to the company on an annual basis by SUVA or private insurer. \n\n
Please upload a valid insurance policy certificate from SUVA or a private insurer confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.
Please provide the issue date for your insurance policy certificate.
Insurance policies are often valid for one year. Employers should always maintain valid coverage at all times while employing applicable workers.
Please provide the expiration date for your insurance policy certificate.
The Registration Confirmation Certificate is issued to a company directly from your respective AHV (OASI) compensation office. A list of all such offices is available on official government portals.
Please upload a valid Registration Confirmation Certificate with cantonal social insurance office confirming your company’s compliance with employee insurance schemes.
